violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
